body_txt: Possibly due to the fact that few things in nature give off green (or purple) light. Natural incandescent light (such as flame) is red, orange, yellow, white or more rarely blue. This trope is also why Green Rocks are named so, even though the trope does not require the color. Mystical Jade can be given this lighting due to the historical properties of jade being supernatural. Related to Sickly Green Glow . Also see Mysterious Purple , Paranormal Palette , and Purple Is Powerful .
